posts.title: Startup—Small Is Beautiful
posts.summary: Startup—Small is Beautiful: Mindful entrepreneurs scale to the right size for good. Investors seek scale fast to maximize investment. Over rapid growth may create problems for founders, above all those such as inadequate cash flow or liquidity (most pundits say #1 reason for startup failure is running out of cash). Another super-fast growth problems could […] The post Startup—Small Is Beautiful appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
